# YesTeachers

> Effortless Prep. Endless Impact. A teaching tool that helps teachers create lesson plans and access ready-made classroom resources instantly.

## What YesTeachers does
- Helps teachers with lesson planning and classroom prep
- Provides ready-made teaching resources and materials
- Saves teachers hours of weekly preparation time
- AI-powered tools built specifically for educators

## Who it's for
Teachers, educators, tutors, homeschool parents, teaching assistants

## Key pages
- Homepage: https://yesteachers.com
- Dashboard: https://yesteachers.com/dashboard.html
- Privacy Policy: https://yesteachers.com/privacy-policy.html
- Terms of Service: https://yesteachers.com/terms-of-service.html

## Category
Education Technology / Lesson Planning / Teacher Tools

## Alternatives
An alternative to: Teachers Pay Teachers, Google Classroom, Planboard
